caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and its applications, as indicated by the visual diagram displayed on the screen. The diagram is a complex network of interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "model sharing," "what people do," and "future of society." These nodes are linked with arrows, suggesting relationships and processes between them. The presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, seems to be explaining the connections and flow within this system. The background includes various browser tabs and bookmarks, indicating that the presentation might be part of a larger set of resources or research materials. The overall focus of the video is likely on understanding and applying systems thinking to address societal issues and challenges.
